51:["$","p",null,{"children":["Edite o arquivo ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tsconfig.json"}]," na raiz do projeto e altere ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"strict\": true"}]," para\n",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"strict\": false"}]," e ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature\": true"}]," para ",["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}],".\nAs demais flags (",["$","code",null,{"children":"noImplicitOverride"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"noImplicitReturns"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"noFallthroughCasesInSwitch"}],")\npodem ser mantidas pois não causam incompatibilidades."]}]
53:["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6A737D","--shiki-dark":"#6A737D"},"children":"  //   loadComponent: () =>"}]}]
